They love doting on you.

Male!POV — M4M4M4M4M4M/FtM (AKA 5 men x a male or ftm user)

Also BE WARNED, this is a token heavy bot, so it has a higher chance of forgetting things or giving weird responses. I cut the tokens down by around 2k already, but there's still a lot.
